findings.description: User input directly concatenated into SQL query via f-string
User input interpolated into SQL query via string formatting
Variable 'user' may be None; accessing .email will raise AttributeError
Variable 'db' may be None; accessing .host will raise AttributeError
API key hardcoded in source code
Database password hardcoded in source code
Hardcoded database credentials in dict literal
Non-atomic read-modify-write on shared counter without lock — race condition
User input from query string embedded unescaped in HTML response
User form input embedded unescaped in HTML template
No type check on operands — string + int produces concatenation instead of addition
discount_pct from user input is string; arithmetic on string causes TypeError
File opened without 'with' statement — handle leaked on exception
SQLite connection never closed — resource leak
Auth bypass: truthy string value of is_admin allows privilege escalation
Timing attack: plain == comparison on password instead of hmac.compare_digest
Missing 401 response when token is absent — request falls through silently
range(len(numbers)-1) skips last element — off-by-one in max search
Inverted condition: returns True for invalid ages and False for valid ones
Page slice uses page_size-1 instead of page_size — last item excluded
Bare except clause swallows all exceptions silently
ZeroDivisionError caught and ignored — function returns None silently
Exception swallowed with no logging — caller cannot distinguish success from failure
